prompt: Create a surreal cinematic landscape showing an enormous explosive fountain of glossy liquid paint or molten cream erupting from the center of a barren desert plain. The eruption is made of thick white fluid streaked and marbled with vivid orange, forming branching splash tendrils that shoot upward and outward like a frozen tree of liquid. Surround it with dozens of floating glossy spheres in different sizes, all suspended in midair; the spheres are white ceramic or pearl-like with orange marbling, plus some smaller solid orange droplets, connected here and there by thin strands and splashes of liquid. Include exactly three dominant foreground spheres: one large marbled white-and-orange sphere at the lower left edge, one large marbled white-and-orange sphere hovering at the upper right, and one large orange-and-white sphere resting near the lower right edge. The background is a vast rocky desert with distant low mountains, scattered stones, wet reflective streaks on the ground, and a dramatic cloudy sky lit by warm golden sunlight. Use a wide-angle perspective, ultra-detailed photorealistic 3D rendering, high dynamic range lighting, sharp focus, turbulent motion frozen in time, glossy reflections, volumetric atmosphere, epic scale, no people, no text, no watermark.
